home.aboutTeaser: A family restaurant started by Tirso in 1984. He managed it for decades with integrity and a strong desire to improve his family's position.

items.name: Hamburgers
items.description: Available only in the morning. Made on the fly with fresh ingredients

items.name: Open Tacos
items.description: Crispy tostada with salsa with meat and avocado or lettuce on top

items.name: Sandwiches
items.description: These sandwiches are so good. They contain everything a sandwich needs

items.name: Milkshakes
items.description: Made with raw milk, these shakes come in multiple flavors so just ask what they have up front

items.name: Tortas

items.description: You can order them with beans, cheese, and salsa with meat

about.title: The Origin of the Gorditas
about.story: This restaurant was started by my grandpa and grandma. They started it so they could support their families.

about.title: Nuestra Historia
about.story: El restaurante fue creado en 1984 por mi abuelito por la necesidad de salir adelante y sostener a su familia. Con el tiempo, el restaurante ganó la reputación de tener las gorditas más famosas de Santa María Transpontina, Jalisco, México.
